title: SQLancer inner join reporting GDK error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl_Orders (OrderID Int32, CustomerID Int32, OrderDate Date, TotalAmount Decimal(10,2)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY OrderID;
CREATE TABLE tbl_Customers (CustomerID Int32, CustomerName String, Email String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY CustomerID;
SELECT o.OrderID, c.CustomerName FROM tbl_Orders AS o FULL OUTER JOIN tbl_Customers AS c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE o.TotalAmount IS NULL OR c.Email IS NULL;
key_bug_features: FULL OUTER JOIN with NULL values in conditions
